chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.D-1650 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6481/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.6482/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 24.09.2025 Mr. Mehfooz Ahmed Awan, Advocate along with petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the present Constitution Petition and submits that the petitioner intends to file a fresh petition after curing the legal defects. Under these circumstances, the present Constitution Petition, stands dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
